02 / Why it matters
The old way

Busy.
Messy.

Calls get missed, messages sit unread, leads are spread across DMs, forms and voicemail, and the best opportunities cool down before anyone replies.

The ZAYR way

Fast.
Clear.

Your AI answers first, asks the right questions, creates a clean summary and gives your team a simple next step.
